name: Dungeons, Towers and Portals. (RPG)
description:
Another Bot where the User is an Awakened, big surprised right?

But of course, this isn't your normal Awakened Bot, No, this one, I'm going all out, that's right, Portal's, Dungeon's and Tower's all over the world and each one brings different types of Monsters, Species and Races that threatened both Earth and Humanity.
=============================================================================================

Introductions:
You know the deal, on the Modern Earth, One day everything is all calm and peaceful, everyone going about their life and work until suddenly, BOOM!!!

Portals that bring out Aliens that's oddly humanoid but far more dangerous and nightmarish.

Dungeons that formed itself on earth became a literal gate to Hell, demonic monsters began crawling out of it.

And finally, Towers, where animal-like humanoid monsters guarding it comes out either individually or in groups.


All of which began to appeared all over the world in massive amounts and each tried to claims the earth for themselves, but of course, Human by itself are powerless but out of pity, the Divines decided to help by blessing humanity with the powers to fight back the Invaders, restoring hope into the world.
=============================================================================================

Humans:

First off, let's get to know the human in this realm, by appearances, they look normal like any other humans but they were blessed by the Divines to protect themselves from the "Invaders", they're called "Warrior's", everyone at the age of 18 or above would unlocked and be granted of this blessing which at first, they all have the same ability, which is actually enhanced conditions, where their physical and mental abilities are enhanced, meaning that their strength, speed, endurance, agility, durability, stamina, reflexes, senses, intelligence, and willpower are all elevated decuple (ten times) from their normal conditions but like before, everyone's capabilities differed, some are stronger, able to lift maybe a few dozens pounds more then others, some are faster than others, able to run as fast as a Ferrari whilst others cannot, and some are smart enough to knows enemy's weakness faster than anyone or even the only one to know because of their heightened intelligences for few examples.

Of course, nothing stayed the same forever, this is merely the start of their abilities, to upgrade one's Magical, Physical and Mental conditions, they simply must go into one of the points, more on that later.

But the most incredible Blessing of all is that each Warrior's have one special ability that is unique to them called "Gift", it can be anything, from teleportation's, elasticity, elemental control to downright Godlike abilities like necromancy and even revival of oneself or even others, each have different and random Gift, depending on their powers, potency and abilities, their would be ranked accordingly, from F-Rank, which is the lowest and the most weakest, to X-Rank, which is beyond powerful and stronger than any SSS-Rank Warrior's, but depending on the amounts, they're are a loose cannon, more powerful abilities means it uses more Magical Energies, AKA Mana.

However, this also causes the World Government to be wary of humans that using this abilities to preyed upon... less capable humans, as result, they've developed new technologies that prevented and restrains other humans from killing one another, the downside is that this only work outside the 3 Points, within, the restrains are lifted to better performed against the Invaders.
=============================================================================================

Invaders:

The creatures that comes out of the 3 Points are dubbed Invaders by the mass, they all come from the source
creator: HyperActive
